title: SIS - Student Records Inquiry Menu Paths
body: Overview Most student inquiry-related pages can be found in SIS from your Home menu in the "Student Records WorkCenter." This guide lists numerous inquiries you may wish to perform and the menu paths associated with those actions. Find the bolded phrases in each menu path on S.R. WorkCenter. Quick Guide WorkCenter: Student Records Start Here > Administrative Homepage > Student Records WorkCenter OR > UW Madison Applications > Registrars Office WorkCenters > Student Records WorkCenter Academic Standing (probation) > Records and Enrollment > Student Term Information > Term History |Academic Standing| Addresses > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person |Addresses| Advisor > Records and Enrollment > Student Background Information > Student Advisor Athletic Participation > Campus Community > Personal Information > Participation Data > Athletic Participation Birth Date & Birth Information > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person , Birth Information Contact/Biographical Data > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person Citizenship/Passport > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person , Citizenship Course Grid Queries: Enrollment Detail Summary , [View Results], click Date to Access Grid Credit Override > Records and Enrollment > Dean/Dept Processing > Term Credit Override Credits — Other > Records and Enrollment > Transfer Credit Evaluation > Other Credits - Manual Credits — Test > Records and Enrollment > Transfer Credit Evaluation > Test Credits - Automated Credits — Transfer > Records and Enrollment > Transfer Credit Evaluation > Course Credits – Automated (Transfer Credits) Cumulative Statistics > Records and Enrollment > Student Term Information > Term History |Cumulative Statistics| Deadlines & Dates — Term/Session > Records and Enrollment > Dates and Deadlines > Session Dates and Deadlines Dean's Action Queries: Dean’s Actions Degree Information > Records and Enrollment > Graduation > Student Degrees |Degree| OR > Records and Enrollment > Career and Program Information > Student Program/Plan - |Student Degrees| Degrees: Internal/UW–Madison Queries: Degree Summary Degrees: External Queries: External Degrees Dissertator Status > Records and Enrollment > Student Term Information > Term Search (Form of Study = DISR) Email Address > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person Enrollment Detail Queries: Enrollment Detail Summary Enrollment System History > Records and Enrollment > Enroll Student > Student Enrollment History Ethnicity > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person |Regional| External Study > Records and Enrollment > Student Term Information > Term Activate a Student (External Study) FERPA — Public Student Directory > Campus Community > Personal Information > Biographical > Person FERPA > Review FERPA Display GPA Summary Queries: GPA Summary Grade Changes Queries: E-Grade Change Grade Detail Queries: Grade Detail Summary Honors and Awards > Campus Community > Personal Enrollment > Student Term Information > Term Search Major Declaration History > Records and Enrollment > Dean/Dept Processing > Major Dec History Milestones > Records and Enrollment > Enroll Students > Student Milestones Names | Preferred Name/Name in Use > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person ; Names | Preferred name in Header Phone > Campus Community > Personal > Career and Program Information > Student Groups > Records and Enrollment > Career and Program Information > View Student Groups by Student Term History > Records and Enrollment > Student Term Transcripts > Request (unofficial) Transcript Report (if you have security) Visa/Permit Data > Campus Community > Personal Information > Add/Update a Person , Visa/Permit Data Withdrawal > Records and for easy printing.
